content: Kumaa doid tuhun di asaasau' nu do otuubungan, koubasan do muot do "Ingkuo ko no?" ka, toi' ko' "Ingkuo no o paganakan nu?" ka.
credits: Sentence from Tatoeba by LeeSooHa (CC-BY 2.0 FR)
relationships: eng:For someone you see more often, it is customary to ask, How are you﹖ or How is your family
